summary: Completed comprehensive testing of IndCoders website third iteration focusing on button text centering and content updates. All backend APIs working perfectly, frontend button centering implemented correctly, and content updates verified successfully.
passed_tests: Contact form submission API (200 OK with proper validation)
API validation for invalid data (422 validation error)
All button text centering - navbar 'Get Started', hero 'Explore Our Work' and 'Talk to Us', CTA 'Join IndCoders Now', contact 'Send Message'
Button CSS classes include inline-flex, items-center, justify-center, text-center
Content headings updated: 'Built by Developers, for Developers', 'Projects That Solve Real Problems', 'What Makes Us Different', 'Our Roadmap', 'Your Next Level Starts Here'
Contact form frontend integration with backend working
Mobile responsive design with hamburger menu working
